name: @czap/scene
description: Author video timelines for LiteShip: a typed scene and track model built on the entity-component substrate in `@czap/core`.
author: Eassa Ayoub <eassa@heyoub.dev>
//peer-vite: OPTIONAL peer: the scene surface (`.`) needs none of it, but the opt-in `./dev` subpath (the dev server) imports vite's `createServer` at RUNTIME. Declaring it here (optional, mirroring @czap/vite's peer) closes the public-subpath dependency closure — a fresh consumer importing `@czap/scene/dev` is told to provide vite, instead of relying on a hoisted copy. Guarded by tests/unit/devops/declared-dependency-closure.test.ts.
